arguments.argument:
event_inherited() bActive=1 image_xscale=-1 image_speed=0
//Enemy base statistics eName="CHAOS Butterdroid" eLevel=37 maxLife=50 life=maxLife pointWorth=10 atkPower=12 affiliation=7 weaponGive=5
animate=0 moveProg=0 runAcc=3 bulletTime=35 if global.shooterDifficulty=1 {bulletDelay=70; bulletMax=3; bulletMod=22} else {bulletDelay=60; bulletMax=5; bulletMod=17} bulletDir=0 bulletCheck=0
jeremyText="Just shoot it down." chaoText="Eaten Ability: DUAL SHOT#Power: 14 (DPS: 60 (2x if both bullets hit))#Fire Rate: 4.2/sec#This fires 2 shots straight ahead. However, the shots will angle themselves up or down at the moment they are fired, toward the direction your ship is moving." devText="N/A"
